appliedUpdates.description: Documented the fresh-boot zero-live runtime behavior and the route-scoped 503 envelope contract in .factory/library/runtime.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in runtime-provider-worker that verification-only or commit-isolation follow-up features may rely on existing targeted tests plus fresh-process verification instead of writing new failing tests first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed feature misc-investigate-fresh-boot-simple-price-empties was a verification/commit-isolation follow-up. Its reviewer and handoff both showed the worker appropriately relied on already-present targeted tests and fresh-process verification rather than adding redundant tests.
